attachments.content: This project uses Design Components: every design is a single streaming `Name.dc.html` file. The full authoring spec is in your system prompt under "Writing code — Design Components" — follow it. Author and edit `.dc.html` content with the `dc_write`, `dc_html_str_replace`, `dc_js_str_replace`, and `dc_set_props` tools (not `write_file`; `str_replace_edit` works but won't stream); template edits stream into the live preview as you type.
attachments.name: Design Components

content.content: 给我1:1 生成此图模板，我需要可以手动修改期限，收益率，投资金额

I'll measure the exact card positions by zooming into that region.Now I'll build the template — the original photo as the backdrop with three rebuilt, editable cards overlaid precisely on the originals.I'll screenshot to compare my overlay against the original.This is a precise overlay-alignment task, so I need to see the result to tune it.Good — overlay is close, but card 3 is too narrow (label wrapped) and needs fixed widths to fully cover the originals. Fixing widths, wrap, and sizing.Very close now. To make the template robust to longer user-entered values (so edited cards never reveal the baked-in originals), I'll paint the original card strip out of the background, then let my editable cards sit on a clean panel. First, sample the panel to find the safe fill region.The left column is clean, uniform deep navy (~RGB 1,22,41) and the panel stays dark out to x≈608. I'll tile that clean strip across the card band to erase the baked-in cards.Let me verify the cleaned background looks seamless before wiring it up.I see faint seams at the strip's top/bottom edges. Let me map the gold corner boundary so I can tile a taller, seam-free column.Panel is essentially uniform dark — so a clean column tiled across will be seamless. Let me redo with a taller fill range so any micro-seam sits far from the cards, then verify zoomed.Clean enough — the cards cover the bulk and gaps show uniform navy. Now wire the DC to the cleaned background and switch to `min-width` so edited values can grow without revealing anything.This is a faithful match to the original, with the three values now live-editable. Let me clean up intermediate context and hand off for verification.完成。模板已 1:1 还原，原图保留为背景（金币、箭头、城市、底部三项说明都在），三张卡片是我重绘的可编辑图层。

修改方式（两种都行）：
- 直接点卡片里的数字在画面上改；
- 或用 Tweaks 面板，已按「期限 / 收益率 / 投资金额」分组，每项分成数值和单位两格：期限 `14`+`天`、收益率 `0.9`+`%`、投资金额 `160+`+`USDT`。卡片宽度会随内容自动伸缩，且不会露出原图旧卡片（原卡片已从背景中抹除）。

说明：控制台那条 `inpage.js` 报错来自你浏览器的钱包插件（MetaMask），与本模板无关，页面渲染正常。

输入很长的数值时第三张卡片会向右靠近金币图案，属正常物理边界——常规数值无影响。

content.content: Tweaks修改后怎么保存 png 格式

Your Tweaks edits are saved into the file (现在是 5天 / 0.4% / 200+USDT)。本平台的 Tweaks 面板本身没有「导出 PNG」按钮——让我直接按当前数值帮你导出一张 PNG。Capture reflects your edits. Normalizing to exact 960×480 and packaging the PNG.The raw capture is 924×523 — it has vertical padding, so stretching distorted it. Let me detect the true banner bounds and crop precisely.Padding is white on all sides. Let me detect the non-white bounding box and crop to it.已导出。下载卡片在下面（960×480，已是你当前的 5天 / 0.4% / 200+USDT）。保存 PNG 的方法：本平台 Tweaks 面板没有导出按钮，改完数值后直接跟我说「导出 PNG」，我就按当前画面生成给你（上方下载卡片即是）。

需要更大尺寸（如 1920×960 用于印刷/高清屏）也可以告诉我。

保存 PNG 的方法：本平台 Tweaks 面板没有导出按钮，改完数值后直接跟我说「导出 PNG」，我就按当前画面生成给你（上方下载卡片即是）。

content.content: 我需要很多张，你这样太麻烦了怎么办

I'll turn this into a self-service generator — add editable fields right on the page, a one-click PNG download, and a batch mode that outputs a ZIP of many banners at once. Let me read the current file exactly so I preserve the verified card visuals.Now I'll rebuild it as a generator: same banner (now with a capture ref) plus an on-page control panel for single edits and a batch ZIP exporter.I left a typo in the download button's gradient. Fixing it, then I'll verify layout and test the actual export.Banner looks perfect. Now let me verify the export actually works — including the gold gradient text, which is the risky part for DOM capture. I'll run a real `toPng` in the preview and overlay the result to inspect it.Export works flawlessly — the green-bordered overlay is the actual generated PNG, with gold gradient text and background fully intact. Now let me check the control panel below.Everything works. The quality dropdown shows "1×" though the default is 2× — that's a controlled-select sync quirk from using holes for option values. I'll switch them to literal values.The dropdown still displays 1× — React's controlled select isn't matching a numeric value to string options. I'll store scale as a string so it matches exactly.Still 1× even on fresh load — the `value` binding on `<select>` isn't applying. Let me probe the actual DOM to confirm before switching approach.The DOM confirms `value:"2"`, `selectedIndex:1` — the dropdown is correctly on 2×. The "1×" was just an html-to-image rendering artifact for native `<select>`; the real browser shows it right. So nothing's broken. Let me confirm JSZip is loaded and the batch path works end-to-end in the live view.Full pipeline confirmed in the live view — capture → PNG → ZIP all work. Shipping it.已经做成自助生成器了 —— 不用再找我，你自己就能批量出图。页面分两块：

单张编辑：直接改「期限 / 收益率 / 投资金额」三组输入框（数值 + 单位分开填），选清晰度（默认 2× = 1920×960），点「下载这张 PNG」即可。

批量生成：在文本框里每行写一条，逗号分隔六项 `期限,单位,收益率,单位,金额,单位`（例 `14,天,0.9,%,160+,USDT`，单位可省略，默认 天/%/USDT），点「生成并下载 ZIP」，一次打包所有图，文件按数值自动命名。

已端到端验证：截图保真（金色渐变字、背景全在）、ZIP 打包正常。

控制台那条 `inpage.js` 报错来自你浏览器的钱包插件（MetaMask），与本工具无关，不影响使用。

contentBlocks.text: I'll turn this into a self-service generator — add editable fields right on the page, a one-click PNG download, and a batch mode that outputs a ZIP of many banners at once. Let me read the current file exactly so I preserve the verified card visuals.

toolCall.name: dc_write

input.b_dc_html:
USDT 收益图 · 批量生成器 改数值 → 一键下载 PNG ／ 批量导出 ZIP
期限 {{ termValue }} {{ termUnit }}
收益率 {{ rateValue }} {{ rateUnit }}
投资金额 {{ amountValue }} {{ amountUnit }}
单张编辑
清晰度
{{ status }}
批量生成（打包 ZIP） 每行一条，用逗号分隔六项：期限,单位,收益率,单位,金额,单位　例如　14,天,0.9,%,160+,USDT　（单位可省略，默认 天 / % / USDT）
{{ batchStatus }}

contentBlocks.text: Banner looks perfect. Now let me verify the export actually works — including the gold gradient text, which is the risky part for DOM capture. I'll run a real `toPng` in the preview and overlay the result to inspect it.

toolCall.name: save_screenshot

steps.code: (async () => { const node = [...document.querySelectorAll('div')].find(d => d.style && d.style.backgroundImage && d.style.backgroundImage.includes('banner_clean')); window.__libs = { h2i: !!window.htmlToImage, jszip: !!window.JSZip, node: !!node }; try { const url = await window.htmlToImage.toPng(node, {width:960,height:480,pixelRatio:1,cacheBust:true,backgroundColor:'#08111f'}); const img = new Image(); img.src = url; img.style.cssText='position:fixed;left:8px;top:8px;width:600px;height:300px;z-index:99999;border:4px solid #39ff14;box-shadow:0 0 0 9999px rgba(0,0,0,.7)'; img.id='__exp'; document.body.appendChild(img); window.__exportOK = url.length; } catch(e){ window.__exportErr = e.message; document.title = 'ERR:'+e.message; } })();

toolCall.output: [elided]

content.content: 模板固定收益率的单位和投资金额单位

Got it — lock 收益率's unit to `%` and 投资金额's unit to `USDT` (no longer editable), keeping 期限's unit editable. Let me read the current file to edit precisely.Locking both units. I'll update the banner to literal `%` / `USDT`, replace those two unit inputs with fixed suffix chips, and simplify batch to 4 columns.Now the logic and props.已固定。收益率单位锁定为 `%`、投资金额单位锁定为 `USDT`，两处在编辑面板中变成不可编辑的灰色后缀标签；期限单位仍可改（默认「天」）。

横幅照常显示「0.9%」「160+ USDT」。批量格式已简化为四项 `期限,单位,收益率,金额`（例 `14,天,0.9,160+`），单位自动补 % 和 USDT。Tweaks 面板也同步去掉了那两个单位项。

contentBlocks.text:
已固定。收益率单位锁定为 `%`、投资金额单位锁定为 `USDT`，两处在编辑面板中变成不可编辑的灰色后缀标签；期限单位仍可改（默认「天」）。

横幅照常显示「0.9%」「160+ USDT」。批量格式已简化为四项 `期限,单位,收益率,金额`（例 `14,天,0.9,160+`），单位自动补 % 和 USDT。Tweaks 面板也同步去掉了那两个单位项。
